content:
53% Skills done and double checked,

I'm working on Mercy's Interlude Menus sheet

FOR VOLUNTEERS OF ALL LANGUAGES:
I had so much positive feedback when I made an organized sheet for the Wheels of Destiny that I've decided to make it a priority of mine to help parse the Gameplay sheet ***as best I can***, per category. This time, I've compiled everything I can find relating to the Interlude menu.

Included here are separate sheets for each section of the Interlude menu, those being:
Dissolution Ruins; Verboten Covenant; Lightless Realm; Phantasmal Dive; Arcane Dominion; Regional D-Effect Zone; and Awakener Trial.

IMPORTANT/README:
1. The **Font and Typeface of all relevant cells have been standardized to the default Excel style**; I don't know yet if this will cause unforeseen issues, so my bad if I shouldn't have done that.
2. **I added a Column** to the sheet to make organization easier.
  - COLUMN A:A "SRC ROW" is the original Row # that the line was pulled from in the "Gameplay" Source Sheet.
  - DELETE THIS COLUMN (A:A) to return the worksheet to the positions of its original columns.
3. IN MOST CASES, **The Sheet Rows have been RE-ORDERED** to help facilitate ease of understanding.
  - Some parts, like UI Elements, were very difficult for me to understand what goes where, so I tried to leave them in manageable chunks but your guess is as good as mine as to what goes where.

HOPE THIS HELPS! May the Silver Key guide us.

Relics are next. <:BennettThumbsUp:773345984474120202>
